---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
One-sentence summary of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution clearly.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context
Mockups, links, or related issues.
